title: Szeged, Csongrád-Csanád — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Szeged, Csongrád-Csanád: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Szeged is a city in Csongrád-Csanád with a population of 160,766. The sunniest city in Hungary, a vibrant university town on the Tisza River known for its Art Nouveau architecture, paprika production, and the Szeged Open-Air Festival.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
